ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the kingdom where the event took place */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park within the kingdom */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the player participating in the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_kingdom_id FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom_id") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kingdom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the kingdom was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the kingdom was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player or admin who created the kingdom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the kingdom where the park is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the park */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the park was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the park was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player or admin who created the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., None, Quest, Challenge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class (e.g., Archer, Warrior, Mage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where credits were earned */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who earned the credits */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credits were earned */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the credits are valid (e.g., not revoked or expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character class of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Banned) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements unlocked by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player profile was last updated */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits earned by the player */,
  "total_redemptions" INTEGER /* Total number of credits redeemed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit redemption */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who redeemed the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward redeemed */,
  "credit_cost" INTEGER /* Number of credits used to redeem the reward */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was redeemed */,
  "redeemed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credits were redeemed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the redemption is valid (e.g., not revoked or canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_redemptions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
